title: (Bullish Signal) AMSC enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 13, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that AMSC's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 88 similar cases where AMSC's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 81 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $18.09 crossed the support line at $18.24 and is trading between $18.24 support and $17.74 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/11/21 - 04/13/21, the price experienced a -28% Downtrend. During the week of 04/06/21 - 04/13/21, the stock fell -3%.

https://preview.redd.it/37zuginwc6t61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=a091de78b80b39f0502075cdbc6b15cb6f1bdbcf

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where AMSC's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 24 of 27 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tikeron A.I. detected that in 50 of 61 cases where AMSC's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for AMSC just turned positive on April 13, 2021. Looking at past instances where AMSC's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tikeron A.I. shows that in 43 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +5.76% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where AMSC advanced for three days, in 256 of 306 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

AMSC may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
